columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Advisory document number

columns.name: ORDRENR
columns.description: Unique order identifier

columns.name: LINJENR
columns.description: Line item number within an order

columns.name: KUNDENR
columns.description: Customer identification number

columns.name: KUNDE_ILAGNR
columns.description: Customer installation or location number

columns.name: VAREMOTTNAVN
columns.description: Product name or description

columns.name: VAREMOTTADR
columns.description: Physical address of the product

columns.name: VAREMOTTPOSTNR
columns.description: Postal code or ZIP code of the product location

columns.name: IS_SPESIFIC
columns.description: Indicator if the record is specific to a particular context

columns.name: LANDKODE
columns.description: Code representing the country or region

columns.name: PLASSERINGSID
columns.description: Identifier for placement or location details

columns.name: TJENESTEVARE
columns.description: Indicator if the product is a service

columns.name: LEVERES_NAA
columns.description: Current quantity delivered or to be delivered

columns.name: PRIS
columns.description: Unit price of the product or service

columns.name: PRISENHET
columns.description: Unit of measurement for pricing (e.g., per unit, per piece)

columns.name: RABPROS
columns.description: Discount percentage applied to the product or service

columns.name: ENHET
columns.description: Unit of measurement for the quantity or price

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was created or last modified

columns.name: LINJE_SITE
columns.description: Site or location associated with the line item

columns.name: SYSTEM
columns.description: Identifier for the system or module that created the record

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: File number reference used in various systems

columns.name: I_ORDRENR
columns.description: Number of the item within an order

columns.name: SLETTE_TS
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was deleted or marked for deletion
